name: dosageCalculator
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.singleDose === undefined || typeof output.result.capped === 'boolean'
_note: Reads weightKg/dosePerKg/frequencyPerDay/maxDailyDose from artifact.data (PharmacyActionPanel + page send {input: data}; the route mirrors data onto the virtual artifact). singleDose = round(weight×dosePerKg×100)/100 mg; dailyDose = round(min(single×freq, maxDaily)) mg; capped = dailyDose>maxDaily. FAIL-CLOSED: a non-finite weight/freq/max falls back to defaults (70 / 1 / unbounded); a non-finite or <=0 dosePerKg returns the honest 'Provide dose per kg' prompt rather than printing 'Infinity mg' / 'NaN mg'. Pure compute, no STATE, no NaN leak. Not medical advice — disclaimer always present.
